title: rubus questieri var. fallax
intro: Rubus questieri var. fallax, also known as the Quester's black raspberry, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the black raspberry plant, belonging to the Rubus genus. The plant contains anthocyanins, powerful antioxidants that have been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to protect against oxidative stress and infections. The health benefits of Rubus questieri var. fallax include its potential to support cardiovascular health, improve cognitive function, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Rubus questieri var. fallax can be made into teas, tinctures, and jams, and are often consumed raw or used in traditional medicine, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
